title: Why do the Motherfuckers mainly blame the victims?

replies.msg:
Why do the Motherfuckers mainly blame the victims? Why do the Motherfuckers like to ignore or even try to justify the Culprit?

Why?

The reason behind this is that the Motherfuckers are doing the same shit as the Culprit in some ways. If the Motherfuckers choose to blame the Culprit but not the victims, it will be very inconvenient for what they are doing. If they cannot do what they are doing anymore or get forced to liquidate their fucking bloody debts of the past, it is deadly to them. So, they must continue anyway.

Until one day, they become the victims of the same way of what they have done before, and then they are done and doomed eternally beyond redemption.

The pandemic of fake rationality (aka. absurdity) is a religion of late capitalism. This is the newest and strangest form of religion in the whole humanity of our history from the beginning of time. The operation of late capitalism is based on this religion, which sheds so much blood that we may never see.

Moreover, the Gods of this religion are money, sexual organs, fame, and unlimited desire satisfaction. Combining all these lesser Gods, the supreme God for each believer in this religion is actually the person himself/herself.

They worship the God on Facebook, on their massive album of selfies, on the "like" and the flattering by others. Nevertheless, everyone sees himself/herself as the only real supreme God.

They are owned by what they own. Eventually, they will be swallowed by the God.

If our faith or confidence in this religion is shaken, the late capitalism system may collapse. It will be most devastating to the "High priest", the "Prophet", and the "King" of this religion. They will be nothing after that, but only mountains of debts (mainly not about money or wealth) for them to pay.

replies.msg:
只係一半答案 仲有另一半blame the victoms嘅人係因為佢哋個 just world worldview
有堆人相信呢個世界應該要好人有好報 壞人有壞報
當佢哋見到有人受到傷害時
為咗可以繼續保持佢哋個信念
佢哋唯有自欺欺人受害者一定係做咗啲錯事、自己唔會做嘅事先至會咁
對於佢哋嚟講，咁先至可以keep到自身嘅安全感
因為如果佢哋面對現實，佢哋會擔心自己有機會係下一個唔好彩嘅人
